metadata.job_summary: 12-month internship supporting Zinc Marketing operations team through full trade lifecycle. Role emphasizes process optimization, stakeholder management, and operational execution in fast-paced commodities environment with flat hierarchy encouraging initiative.

research.company_mission: One of the world's largest producers and marketers of commodities, operating with entrepreneurial culture that encourages new ideas and adaptation to change
research.recent_news: Kazzinc (Glencore majority-owned) opening metal sales to rival traders in 2026 under new marketing model; zinc production at 709,400 tonnes in first 9 months of 2025 (+10% YoY); targeting 15% emissions reduction by end of 2026

resume.professional_summary: MSc Finance graduate with operational M&A experience in lean environments. At Glencore's Zinc Marketing Department, I will contribute process-oriented execution and analytical rigor to support trade lifecycle operations. Proven ability to thrive in flat structures, delivering results across concurrent mandates while managing multicultural relationships in fast-paced settings.
auraia_bullets: Contributed to end-to-end deal execution in lean 3-person team (sourcing, valuation, due diligence, negotiations, closing), thriving in flat organizational structure with high individual responsibility

Managed relationships with clients, advisors, and counterparties across Europe, US, and Asia throughout transaction lifecycle, developing multicultural communication and stakeholder coordination in fast-paced environments

Led marketing materials production, maintained buyer universes, and coordinated data room management across 7 concurrent mandates, showcasing process-oriented approach and detail-focused execution under time pressure
resume.rc_bullet: Prepared investment memos including market analysis, competitive positioning, and financial projections for 3 potential acquisitions (EUR 10M-30M revenues), demonstrating problem-solving skills and ability to synthesize complex information for strategic decision-making
resume.europ_bullet: Built automated financial dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs and performed variance analysis on monthly P&L results for CHF 50M+ subsidiary, showcasing IT proficiency, process optimization mindset to maximize operational efficiency, and ability to streamline reporting workflows
leadership_bullets: Led AIESEC's post-COVID recovery by sourcing leads and negotiating partnerships, closing 3 deals generating CHF 60K revenue (+40% placements), demonstrating resilience
Founded Screeny.ai, an AI buyer identification tool adopted by 3 M&A firms, reducing search time from 10h+ to 20min, showcasing innovation and diverse task execution
Manage investment portfolio using options strategies (CSPs, CCs), generating CHF 5K+ premiums through analytical thinking and strategic decisions in fast-paced markets
resume.courses: Corporate Governance and M&A, Data Science for Finance, Cross-Cultural Management
resume.skills: Financial Modeling | Data Analysis | Valuation | Process Optimization

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Zinc Marketing Department Intern Position
cover_letter.intro: Glencore's entrepreneurial value of encouraging new ideas and quickly adapting to change resonates deeply with my experience in lean M&A environments. When Kazzinc opens its metal sales to rival traders under the new 2026 marketing model, operational excellence and process innovation will be essential. I am eager to contribute my detail-focused execution and stakeholder coordination skills to support the Zinc Marketing team during this transformative period.
cover_letter.body_1: **Trade Lifecycle Operations in Flat Structures** - As sole analyst in a 3-person M&A boutique, I thrived in a flat organizational structure with high individual responsibility. Managing 7 concurrent mandates, I coordinated marketing materials, maintained buyer databases, and handled data room logistics while engaging with multicultural counterparties across Europe, US, and Asia. This experience directly translates to supporting trade lifecycle operations at Glencore, where initiative and process-oriented execution are paramount.
cover_letter.body_2: **Problem-Solving and Analytical Rigor** - At Europ Assistance, I built automated dashboards for CHF 50M+ operations, demonstrating the process optimization mindset your role requires. At RC Group, I prepared investment memos synthesizing complex market analysis and financial projections for acquisition targets. These experiences align with supporting the Zinc Marketing team on diverse operational tasks requiring analytical thinking and attention to detail.
cover_letter.body_3: **Resilience and Multicultural Agility** - Leading AIESEC's post-COVID recovery, I closed 3 partnerships generating CHF 60K revenue despite challenging market conditions. Founding Screeny.ai taught me to embrace diverse tasks from software development to sales outreach. These experiences mirror the adaptability needed to thrive in Glencore's dynamic commodities environment while working with multicultural stakeholders across your global network.
cover_letter.closing: Glencore's commitment to decarbonization (15% emissions reduction by 2026) and operational innovation aligns with my values. I am excited to contribute my process-oriented mindset, multicultural communication skills, and resilient work ethic to the Zinc Marketing Department. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience can support your team's operational excellence.

email.subject: Application - Zinc Marketing Intern - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Zinc Marketing Department Intern position at Glencore.

Your entrepreneurial culture and the Zinc team's new 2026 marketing model present an exciting opportunity to contribute operational rigor in a transformative period. My experience coordinating 7 concurrent M&A mandates in a lean team aligns with the process-oriented execution and stakeholder management your role requires.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
turionadrian@gmail.com
